zh.lifeSummary: 當Richenza von Polen於1116年4月12日出生時，她的父親Boleslaw (III.) von Polen30歲，母親Salome von Berg-Schelklingen26歲。她於大約1127年與Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden在丹麥里伯里伯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1165年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richenza von Polen于1116年4月12日出生时，她的父亲Boleslaw (III.) von Polen30岁，母亲Salome von Berg-Schelklingen26岁。她于大约1127年与Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden在丹麦里伯里伯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1165年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Polen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch (Van Polen): ethnic name for a Pole or nickname for someone with some other connection with Poland, from Polen ‘Poland’.
Possibly also Irish: variant of   Polin  .

variants.name: Polin
meanings: Irish (counties Armagh and Down): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Póilín, a patronymic from a personal name formed from a pet form of Pól (see Paul ).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Poland, from a Slavicized form of German Polen ‘Poland’.

en.lifeSummary: When Richenza von Polen was born on 12 April 1116, her father, Boleslaw (III.) von Polen, was 30 and her mother, Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, was 26. She married Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden about 1127, in Ribe, Ribe, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1165.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richenza von Polen est née le 12 avril 1116, son père, Boleslaw (III.) von Polen, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden environ 1127, à Ribe, Ribe, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1165.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richenza von Polen am 12. April 1116 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Boleslaw (III.) von Polen 30 und ihre Mutter Salome von Berg-Schelklingen 26. Sie hat um 1127 in Ribe, Ribe, Dänemark Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1165.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richenza von Polen è nata il il 12 aprile 1116, sua padre, Boleslaw (III.) von Polen, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden circa 1127, nel Ribe, Ribe, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1165.

ja.lifeSummary: Richenza von Polenが1116年4月12日に生まれた時，父Boleslaw (III.) von Polenは30歳，母Salome von Berg-Schelklingenは26歳であった。約1127年にデンマークリベリベでMagnus I den Stærke of Swedenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1165年以後に死去した。

ko.Roskilde, Copenhagen, Denmark: 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드
ko.lifeSummary: Richenza von Polen(이)가 1116년 4월 12일에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Boleslaw (III.) von Polen(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Salome von Berg-Schelklingen(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1127년 덴마크 리브 리브에서 Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 이후 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden aproximadamente 1127, em Ribe, Ribe, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1165.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richenza von Polen родилась 12 апреля 1116 г., её отцу по имени Boleslaw (III.) von Polen было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Salome von Berg-Schelklingen, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden около 1127 г. в местности риб, риб, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1165 г.

Se casó con Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden aproximadamente 1127, en Ribe, Ribe, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1165.
